projectTitle_es: Consultoría Digital y Resolución de Problemas

summary.headline: Haven has 20 years of work behind it. This proposal is about what gets built around it next.
summary.body:
Every business that has been around for 20 years carries a body of knowledge, a way of working, and a set of habits that got it where it is. The next stage of growth rarely depends on doing more of the same — it usually depends on what gets built around the work that is already happening. This proposal lays out how ZNAS would help Haven build that next layer.

ZNAS comes in as a consultant and a fixer. The role is straightforward: identify the digital and technological problems holding Haven back, and solve them one by one, in the order that makes the most impact for the business. José Sanz steps in as Haven's fractional CTO, supported by his team where needed. He doesn't replace anyone on the Haven side — he works alongside Ángel, brings outside expertise, and takes ownership of the technical problems Haven needs resolved.

The starting point is already on the table: the four suspended Google Business Profiles. That's Haven's primary lead-generation channel and the most urgent issue right now. From the first week, ZNAS attends to that recovery in parallel with a broader assessment of Haven's digital operation. From there, the work continues, covering whichever priorities surface as the most valuable to address next.

Throughout the engagement, ZNAS proposes, substantiates, and recommends; Haven gives the green light on every step. Each phase of work is presented for review and approval before being executed. Ángel keeps full control over direction, pace, and depth — including the right to pause, resume later, or execute part of the plan with Haven's own resources at any point.
highlights: Three-phase backbone — Assessment, Transformation Proposal, Execution — with Ángel's green light at every step
Suspended Google Business Profiles attended to from week one, in parallel with the broader digital assessment
AI-orchestrator methodology: years of traditional development compressed into months without sacrificing quality
17+ years building production-scale systems across airlines, language services, and consumer platforms
Everything ZNAS builds for Haven is owned 100% by Haven — no retained rights
Month-to-month engagement with 15 days' notice — Ángel keeps full control over pace and depth

roadmap.description: Understanding Haven in depth from a technological and operational perspective. José analyzes how the business runs today, which tools and systems are in use, where current technology falls short, and which manual processes can be replaced or improved through automation and AI. The work is grounded in direct observation of the operation, conversations with Ángel and his team, and review of the available data — never in assumptions. From the first week, ZNAS also takes on the recovery of the suspended Google Business Profiles in parallel.
deliverables: Technical and operational assessment of Haven's current digital state
Active recovery work on the four suspended Google Business Profiles
Map of the real opportunities to transform through technology and AI
A clear picture of where Haven stands today in digital maturity, and what's possible next

roadmap.description: With the assessment in hand, José returns with a concrete proposal. Not a generic digitalization plan, not an open-ended recommendation — a tailored technological restructuring roadmap detailing which systems will be built or replaced, which processes will be automated, in what order, how long each component takes, and what results to expect at each stage. Ángel reviews, asks the questions he needs to ask, adjusts what needs adjusting, and approves before any execution begins.
deliverables: Tailored restructuring roadmap with prioritized scope
Specific results expected at each stage
An approved plan with full visibility into what gets built, in what order, and what to expect

roadmap.description: Once the plan is approved, execution begins. José and his team implement each technological piece in the agreed order, integrating new systems with the existing operation, training Haven's team in the use and administration of the new tools, and adjusting the plan as the business responds. Duration depends on the scope of the approved plan and the pace Haven decides to sustain. At some point, the new digital infrastructure is operating at full capacity, the team is autonomous, and the engagement either closes or transitions into a lighter strategic advisory relationship.
deliverables: Implementation of each technological piece in the agreed order
Integration of new systems with Haven's existing operation
Training and knowledge transfer to the Haven team
New digital infrastructure operating at full capacity, Haven's team autonomous in its day-to-day
Continuity plan or transition to lighter strategic advisory at engagement end

timeline.description: Ángel receives this proposal for review.
Ángel reads through the proposal and surfaces any questions.
Walk through any open points and align on the scope of the engagement.
Engagement terms locked in. ZNAS starts the week after.
Phase 1 kicks off: assessment of Haven's digital operation, in parallel with the recovery of the suspended Google Business Profiles.

investment.description: ZNAS engages Haven on a fractional CTO basis. The work is structured month to month with no long-term commitment, so Ángel can pause, accelerate, or wind down the engagement at any point with 15 days' notice. Specific scope and pricing are confirmed in the alignment meeting and revisited as the work progresses. CoPresent — Visionarys' AI platform mentioned in early conversations — is intentionally out of scope here; if Haven evaluates it later, that's a separate agreement directly with Visionarys.

tiers.name: Fractional CTO Engagement
tiers.description: Senior consultant focused on solving the right problems, backed by a team that can move fast and deliver. Ángel approves every implementation decision. ZNAS proposes, substantiates, and executes; Haven gives the green light.
includes: Executive technology leadership and architecture decisions
Direct execution: code, deployment, and working systems delivered
Recovery of the four suspended Google Business Profiles from week one
Regular progress reports throughout the engagement
Training and knowledge transfer to the Haven team
Clear continuity plan at engagement end
100% intellectual property ownership for everything ZNAS builds for Haven
Active Tech E&O, Cyber Liability, and AI coverage of $1M USD
Month-to-month renewal with 15 days' notice to conclude
